instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: The former account I have made, O Theophilus, concerning all the things that Jesus began both to do and to teach,
output: En el primer relato, oh Teófilo, hablé acerca de todas las cosas que Jesús comenzó a hacer y a enseñar,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Until the day on which He was taken up, after He had given commandment through the Holy Spirit to the apostles whom He chose;
output: hasta el día en que fue llevado arriba, después de haber dado mandamientos por el Espíritu Santo a los apóstoles que había escogido;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: To whom also He presented Himself alive after His suffering by many irrefutable proofs, appearing to them through a period of forty days and speaking the things concerning the kingdom of God.
output: a quienes también, después de haber padecido, se presentó vivo con muchas pruebas indubitables, apareciéndoseles durante cuarenta días y hablándoles de lo tocante al reino de Dios.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And as He met together with them, He charged them not to depart from Jerusalem, but to wait for the promise of the Father, which, He said, You heard from Me;
output: Y estando reunido con ellos, les mandó que no se fueran de Jerusalén, sino que esperasen la promesa del Padre, la cual, les dijo, oísteis de Mí.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: For John baptized with water, but you shall be baptized in the Holy Spirit not many days from now.
output: Porque Juan bautizó con agua, mas vosotros seréis bautizados en el Espíritu Santo dentro de no muchos días.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: So the ones who came together asked Him, saying, Lord, are You at this time restoring the kingdom to Israel?
output: Entonces los que se habían reunido le preguntaron, diciendo: Señor, ¿restaurarás el reino a Israel en este tiempo?

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: But He said to them, It is not for you to know times or seasons which the Father has set by His own authority.
output: Pero Él les dijo: No os toca a vosotros saber los tiempos o las estaciones que el Padre dispuso por Su propia autoridad;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: But you shall receive power when the Holy Spirit comes upon you, and you shall be My witnesses both in Jerusalem and in all Judea and Samaria and unto the uttermost part of the earth.
output: pero recibiréis poder, cuando haya venido sobre vosotros el Espíritu Santo, y seréis Mis testigos en Jerusalén, en toda Judea, en Samaria, y hasta lo último de la tierra.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And when He had said these things, while they were looking on, He was lifted up, and a cloud took Him away from their sight.
output: Y habiendo dicho estas cosas, viéndolo ellos, fue alzado, y le recibió una nube que le ocultó de sus ojos.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And while they were looking intently into heaven as He went, behold, two men in white clothing stood beside them,
output: Y estando ellos con los ojos puestos en el cielo, mientras Él se iba, he aquí se pusieron junto a ellos dos varones con vestiduras blancas,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Who also said, Men of Galilee, why do you stand looking into heaven? This Jesus, who has been taken up from you into heaven, will come in the same way as you beheld Him going into heaven.
output: los cuales también les dijeron: Varones de Galilea, ¿por qué os quedáis mirando al cielo? Este Jesús, que ha sido tomado de vosotros al cielo, vendrá de la misma manera que le habéis visto ir al cielo.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Then they returned to Jerusalem from the mount called Olivet, which is near Jerusalem, a Sabbath day’s journey away.
output: Entonces volvieron a Jerusalén desde el monte que se llama del Olivar, el cual está cerca de Jerusalén, camino de un día de Sábado.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And when they entered, they went up to the upper room where they were residing, Peter and John and James and Andrew, Philip and Thomas, Bartholomew and Matthew, James the son of Alphaeus and Simon the Zealot and Judas the brother of James.
output: Y entrados, subieron al aposento alto, donde moraban Pedro y Juan y Jacobo y Andrés, Felipe y Tomás, Bartolomé y Mateo, Jacobo hijo de Alfeo, Simón el Zelote y Judas hermano de Jacobo.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: These all continued steadfastly with one accord in prayer, together with the women and Mary the mother of Jesus, and with His brothers.
output: Todos éstos perseveraban unánimes en oración, con las mujeres, y con María la madre de Jesús, y con Sus hermanos.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And in those days Peter stood up in the midst of the brothers and said (there was a group of persons gathered together, about a hundred and twenty),
output: Y en aquellos días Pedro se levantó en medio de los hermanos (un grupo como de ciento veinte estaba reunido allí), y dijo:

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Men, brothers, the Scripture had to be fulfilled, which the Holy Spirit spoke before through the mouth of David concerning Judas, who became a guide to those who seized Jesus;
output: Varones hermanos, era necesario que se cumpliese la Escritura, en que el Espíritu Santo habló antes por boca de David acerca de Judas, quien se hizo guía de los que prendieron a Jesús;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: For he was numbered among us and was allotted his portion of this ministry.
output: por cuanto era contado con nosotros, y se le asignó una porción de este ministerio.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: (Now this man acquired a piece of land with the wages of unrighteousness; and falling headlong, he burst in the middle, and all his inward parts gushed out.
output: Éste, pues, con salario de injusticia adquirió un campo, y cayendo de cabeza, se reventó por la mitad, y todas sus entrañas se derramaron.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And it became known to all those dwelling in Jerusalem, so that that piece of land was called in their own dialect, Akeldamach, that is, Field of Blood.)
output: Y fue notorio a todos los habitantes de Jerusalén, de tal manera que aquel campo se llama en su propia lengua Acéldama, que quiere decir, Campo de sangre.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: For it is written in the book of Psalms, “Let his habitation become desolate, and let no one dwell in it”; and, “His overseership let another take.”
output: Porque está escrito en el libro de los Salmos: “Sea hecha desierta su habitación, y no haya quien more en ella”; y: “Tome otro su cargo”.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: It is necessary therefore that of the men who accompanied us all the time in which the Lord Jesus went in and went out among us,
output: Es necesario, pues, que de estos hombres que nos han acompañado todo el tiempo que el Señor Jesús entraba y salía entre nosotros,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Beginning from the baptism of John until the day on which He was taken up from us, one of these should become a witness of His resurrection with us.
output: comenzando desde el bautismo de Juan hasta el día en que de entre nosotros fue llevado arriba, uno sea hecho testigo con nosotros de Su resurrección.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And they proposed two, Joseph, called Barsabbas, who was surnamed Justus, and Matthias.
output: Y propusieron a dos: a José, llamado Barsabás, que tenía por sobrenombre Justo, y a Matías.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And they prayed and said, You Lord, Knower of the hearts of all, show us clearly the one whom You have chosen of these two
output: Y orando, dijeron: Tú, Señor, que conoces los corazones de todos, muestra cuál de estos dos has escogido,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: To take the place of this ministry and apostleship, from which Judas turned aside to go to his own place.
output: para que tome la parte de este ministerio y apostolado, de que se desvió Judas para irse a su propio lugar.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And they cast lots for them, and the lot fell on Matthias; and he was counted with the eleven apostles.
output: Y les echaron suertes, y la suerte cayó sobre Matías; y fue contado con los once apóstoles.
